title: Being able to automate or have an automation recipe that gets the no. of Seen or Like in the update section into a number column
excerpt: In order to create more insights through the use of dashboard widgets for responses and engagements on the updates section of the item, hope monday.com could make it available via an automation.

posts.author: donaldcornel (Donald Cornel)
